description: Fixed five bugs in aspire ls: read commands no longer silently create aspire.config.json next to an existing .aspire/settings.json, migration warnings now reference the user-authored file, --stream output is arrival-ordered, invalid path characters in appHost.path produce a clear localized error, and on macOS symlinked paths are deduplicated so the same AppHost is not listed twice.
name: Fix five aspire ls bugs
